metadata.description: Guardrails and craft for coding agents. Deterministic hooks where judgment isn't needed, sharp skills where it is.

plugins.name: tokenlock
plugins.description: Design-token enforcement hooks: catches hardcoded colors and raw Tailwind palette utilities on every write, and suggests the matching token from your own token files.

plugins.name: no-slop
plugins.description: Technical writing without the machine-prose tells: an evidence-over-adjectives craft skill, a deterministic sloplint checker, and a voice extractor that builds a personal voice skill from your real writing.
